title: Uragoga uliginosa

This family includes over 2,000 species of plants, many of which are found in tropical and subtropical regions. Uragoga uliginosa is a genus within the Acanthaceae family, and its classification is further divided into various species. The exact classification of Uragoga uliginosa within the Acanthaceae family is not well-documented, but it is generally considered to be a part of the Camptothecae tribe. Further research is needed to determine the specific classification of Uragoga uliginosa.
